arts.ttl: Why Martin Odegaard Isn't Playing for Arsenal vs. Wolverhampton Wanderers
arts.sum: Martin Ødegaard has been replaced by youngster Ethan Nwaneri for Arsenal's Premier League match against Wolverhampton Wanderers on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Shock absentee hands Arsenal new Premier League blow against Wolves
arts.sum: Arsenal are just about hanging onto the coat tails of Premier League leaders Liverpool and will be desperately hoping not to drop more points in Saturday’s game away to Wolves. Why isn’t Martin Odegaard playing for Arsenal against Wolves in the Premier League?

arts.ttl: Why Martin Odegaard and Mikel Merino are not playing for Arsenal against Wolves
arts.sum: Gunners without influential captain for must-win game in the title race at Molineux on Saturday

arts.ttl: Real Madrid ready to pay big money for “great player” doing an “amazing job” at Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid are interested in signing the Arsenal defender William Saliba. According to a report from Fichajes, they are desperate to improve their defensive unit because of the constant injury problems at the back. Eder Militao and David Alaba have struggled with persistent injury problems and signing a quality central defender is a top priority […] The post Real Madrid ready to pay big money for “great player” doing an “amazing job” at Arsenal appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains shock Arsenal team news for Wolves clash
arts.sum: There was good news and bad news for Arsenal ahead of Saturday's Premier League meeting with Wolves.

arts.ttl: Arsenal trio return to starting lineup vs Wolves in huge boost for Arteta
arts.sum: Arsenal welcomed back William Saliba, Ethan Nwaneri and Myles Lewis-Skelly to the starting lineup for Saturday’s Premier League clash with Wolves. The centre-back missed last week’s 2-2 draw with Aston Villa and the midweek win over Dinamo Zagreb in the Uefa Champions League after he was clutching his hamstring after the North London Derby against […] The post Arsenal trio return to starting lineup vs Wolves in huge boost for Arteta first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Can Arsenal catch Liverpool? Merse vs Sherwood, Morrison in HEATED title race debate!
arts.sum: Paul Merson took on Tim Sherwood and Clinton Morrison in a heated title debate on whether Arsenal can catch Liverpool to snag the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed major injury boost for Wolves clash - but two key stars ruled out
arts.sum: Arsenal head to Molineux to face a struggling Wolves side, with Mikel Arteta's side hoping to return to winning ways in the Premier League after drawing last time out

arts.ttl: Villa join race to sign Cunha - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Aston Villa join battle to sign Wolves forward Matheus Cunha, Barcelona's hopes of signing Marcus Rashford from Manchester United suffer a setback and Chelsea on course to sign Alejandro Garnacho.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Man United forward leaves on loan, Andre Silva in advanced talks over West Ham move
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Ethan Wheatley to Walsall, Andre Silva to West Ham United and an update on Beto's future at Everton.
